LanguageData.EI_Plant_Oats.label: oat plant
LanguageData.EI_Plant_Oats.description: A medium-cycle grain crop. It matures more slowly than rice but sooner than corn, producing oats for food, feed, trade, storage, and processing.
LanguageData.EI_RawOats.label: oats
LanguageData.EI_RawOats.description: Harvested oat grain. It can be eaten raw, cooked, fed to animals, stored, traded, or processed into other foods.
